requirement_topic.en: EMC — CISPR-Based GSO Standards for Wireless / IoT Devices
requirement_topic.zh: EMC — 无线/物联网设备的基于CISPR的GSO标准
requirement_topic.zht: EMC — 無線/物聯網裝置的基於CISPR的GSO標準

summary.en: Wireless and IoT devices sold in Qatar must comply with electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) requirements per CISPR-based GSO (Gulf Standardisation Organisation) technical standards as adopted for GCC member states. GSO standards for EMC are harmonised with the relevant CISPR publications and ETSI EN 301 489 series (radiated emissions, conducted emissions, immunity). Test reports demonstrating compliance with the applicable GSO/CISPR EMC standards are submitted as part of the CRA Qatar type approval application. CRA Qatar evaluates EMC evidence as a technical component of type approval; standalone EMC clearance is not issued separately. Arabic and English labelling is preferred for product documentation.
summary.zh: 在卡塔尔销售的无线及物联网设备须符合GCC成员国采纳的基于CISPR的GSO（海湾标准化组织）技术标准的电磁兼容性（EMC）要求。GSO的EMC标准与相关CISPR出版物及ETSI EN 301 489系列（辐射骚扰、传导骚扰、抗扰度）协调。证明符合适用的GSO/CISPR EMC标准的测试报告作为卡塔尔CRA型号认证申请的技术组成部分提交。卡塔尔CRA将EMC证据作为型号认证的技术组成部分进行评估；不单独颁发EMC许可。产品文件建议使用阿拉伯文和英文标注。
summary.zht: 在卡達銷售的無線及物聯網裝置須符合GCC成員國採納的基於CISPR的GSO（海灣標準化組織）技術標準的電磁相容性（EMC）要求。GSO的EMC標準與相關CISPR出版物及ETSI EN 301 489系列（輻射騷擾、傳導騷擾、抗擾度）協調。證明符合適用的GSO/CISPR EMC標準的測試報告作為卡達CRA型號認證申請的技術組成部分提交。卡達CRA將EMC證據作為型號認證的技術組成部分進行評估；不單獨頒發EMC許可。產品文件建議使用阿拉伯文和英文標注。

standards_or_laws: GSO CISPR 32 (Multimedia equipment — emissions limits, adopted by GCC member states)
ETSI EN 301 489-1 (Common EMC requirements for radio equipment)
ETSI EN 301 489-17 (EMC for broadband data transmission equipment — Wi-Fi / BT)
ETSI EN 301 489-3 (EMC for SRD — LoRa, sub-GHz IoT)
CRA Qatar Type Approval Technical Requirements (EMC chapter)

summary.en: In China, EMC requirements for wireless and ICT products are covered under CCC (China Compulsory Certification) through GB/T 9254 (equivalent to CISPR 22/32 for emissions) and GB/T 17618 (immunity, aligned with CISPR 35 / IEC 61000-4 series). SRRC radio type approval also includes radio frequency (RF) emission limits. CCC EMC testing is conducted by CNCA-designated CCC laboratories. GB/T 9254 and GB/T 17618 are broadly aligned with the CISPR standards but are separate Chinese national standards.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线及ICT产品的EMC要求通过CCC（中国强制认证）下的GB/T 9254（等同于CISPR 22/32辐射限值）和GB/T 17618（抗扰度，与CISPR 35/IEC 61000-4系列对标）涵盖。SRRC无线电型号认证还包括射频（RF）辐射限值。CCC EMC测试由CNCA指定的CCC实验室进行。GB/T 9254和GB/T 17618与CISPR标准总体对标，但属独立的中国国家标准。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線及ICT產品的EMC要求通過CCC（中國強制認證）下的GB/T 9254（等同於CISPR 22/32輻射限值）和GB/T 17618（抗擾度，與CISPR 35/IEC 61000-4系列對標）涵蓋。SRRC無線電型號認證還包括射頻（RF）輻射限值。CCC EMC測試由CNCA指定的CCC實驗室進行。GB/T 9254和GB/T 17618與CISPR標準總體對標，但屬獨立的中國國家標準。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254-2021 (ICT equipment EMC emissions — aligned with CISPR 32)
GB/T 17618-2015 (ICT equipment immunity — aligned with CISPR 35 / IEC 61000-4)
MIIT SRRC RF emission limits (radio type approval technical annex)

gap.en: While GSO CISPR-based EMC standards and Chinese GB/T 9254 / GB/T 17618 are both derived from CISPR publications, CCC EMC test reports to GB/T 9254 and GB/T 17618 are not directly accepted by CRA Qatar. Fresh EMC test reports from a CRA-accepted laboratory to the applicable GSO/CISPR or ETSI EN 301 489 series standards are required as part of the CRA Qatar type approval submission. The test report must reference the GSO or ETSI standard numbers, not the GB/T equivalents, to be processed by CRA Qatar.
gap.zh: 尽管基于CISPR的GSO EMC标准与中国GB/T 9254/GB/T 17618均源自CISPR出版物，但CCC GB/T 9254和GB/T 17618 EMC测试报告不被卡塔尔CRA直接接受。须作为卡塔尔CRA型号认证申请的一部分，提交经CRA认可实验室依据适用的GSO/CISPR或ETSI EN 301 489系列标准出具的全新EMC测试报告。测试报告须引用GSO或ETSI标准编号，而非GB/T等效标准，以供卡塔尔CRA受理。
gap.zht: 儘管基於CISPR的GSO EMC標準與中國GB/T 9254/GB/T 17618均源自CISPR出版物，但CCC GB/T 9254和GB/T 17618 EMC測試報告不被卡達CRA直接接受。須作為卡達CRA型號認證申請的一部分，提交經CRA認可實驗室依據適用的GSO/CISPR或ETSI EN 301 489系列標準出具的全新EMC測試報告。測試報告須引用GSO或ETSI標準編號，而非GB/T等效標準，以供卡達CRA受理。

source.publisher: GSO — Gulf Standardisation Organisation (GCC Standardization Organization)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC compliance to CISPR-based GSO standards is required for wireless and IoT devices sold in Qatar and is assessed as part of CRA Qatar type approval. CCC EMC test reports to GB/T 9254 / GB/T 17618 are not accepted by CRA Qatar; fresh test reports referencing GSO/CISPR or ETSI EN 301 489 standards from a CRA-accepted laboratory are required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 基于CISPR的GSO标准EMC合规是在卡塔尔销售的无线及物联网设备的必要条件，作为卡塔尔CRA型号认证的一部分进行评估。GB/T 9254/GB/T 17618的CCC EMC测试报告不被卡塔尔CRA接受；须提交经CRA认可实验室出具的引用GSO/CISPR或ETSI EN 301 489标准的全新测试报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 基於CISPR的GSO標準EMC合規是在卡達銷售的無線及物聯網裝置的必要條件，作為卡達CRA型號認證的一部分進行評估。GB/T 9254/GB/T 17618的CCC EMC測試報告不被卡達CRA接受；須提交經CRA認可實驗室出具的引用GSO/CISPR或ETSI EN 301 489標準的全新測試報告。

requirement_topic.en: 5 GHz Band Restriction — W52 / W53 Indoor-Use Limitation in Qatar
requirement_topic.zh: 5 GHz频段限制 — 卡塔尔W52/W53室内使用限制
requirement_topic.zht: 5 GHz頻段限制 — 卡達W52/W53室內使用限制

summary.en: Qatar applies a 5 GHz Wi-Fi indoor-use restriction on the W52 (5.15–5.25 GHz) and W53 (5.25–5.35 GHz) sub-bands, consistent with ITU-R recommendations and GCC regional practice. These channels may only be used in indoor environments in Qatar; outdoor use of W52 and W53 channels is restricted. The W56 (5.47–5.725 GHz) and higher sub-bands availability for outdoor use should be verified directly with CRA Qatar, as specific frequency coordination rules may apply. Devices with 5 GHz radio capability must declare and restrict permitted operating channels as part of the CRA Qatar type approval application and must carry compliant firmware that enforces the channel restrictions. Product labelling and documentation must reflect Qatar-permitted channels in Arabic and English.
summary.zh: 卡塔尔对5 GHz Wi-Fi的W52（5.15–5.25 GHz）和W53（5.25–5.35 GHz）子频段实施室内使用限制，与ITU-R建议和GCC地区惯例一致。这些信道在卡塔尔只能在室内环境中使用；W52和W53信道的室外使用受到限制。W56（5.47–5.725 GHz）及更高子频段用于室外使用的可用性须直接向卡塔尔CRA核实，因为可能适用特定频率协调规则。具有5 GHz无线电功能的设备须在卡塔尔CRA型号认证申请中声明并限制允许的工作信道，并须携带强制执行信道限制的合规固件。产品标签和文件须以阿拉伯文和英文反映卡塔尔允许的信道。
summary.zht: 卡達對5 GHz Wi-Fi的W52（5.15–5.25 GHz）和W53（5.25–5.35 GHz）子頻段實施室內使用限制，與ITU-R建議和GCC地區慣例一致。這些信道在卡達只能在室內環境中使用；W52和W53信道的室外使用受到限制。W56（5.47–5.725 GHz）及更高子頻段用於室外使用的可用性須直接向卡達CRA核實，因為可能適用特定頻率協調規則。具有5 GHz無線電功能的裝置須在卡達CRA型號認證申請中聲明並限制允許的工作信道，並須攜帶強制執行信道限制的合規固件。產品標籤和文件須以阿拉伯文和英文反映卡達允許的信道。

standards_or_laws: ITU-R Recommendation M.1450 (5 GHz RLAN channel plan and co-existence framework)
ETSI EN 301 893 v2.1.1 (5 GHz WLAN — DFS / TPC requirements for W53 / W56)
CRA Qatar Type Approval Technical Requirements — 5 GHz channel restriction annex
GCC member state 5 GHz frequency allocation (indoor restriction on W52 / W53)

summary.en: China also restricts the W52 and W53 sub-bands (5.15–5.35 GHz) to indoor use under SRRC radio type approval requirements. SRRC-approved 5 GHz Wi-Fi devices in China must implement DFS (Dynamic Frequency Selection) and TPC (Transmit Power Control) for W53 channels and must restrict W52 to indoor operation. The W56 band (5.47–5.725 GHz) is permitted for indoor and outdoor use in China subject to DFS. China's SRRC channel restrictions for 5 GHz broadly align with the GCC approach for the lower sub-bands.
summary.zh: 中国在SRRC无线电型号认证要求下也对W52和W53子频段（5.15–5.35 GHz）实施室内使用限制。中国SRRC批准的5 GHz Wi-Fi设备须为W53信道实施DFS（动态频率选择）和TPC（发射功率控制），并须将W52限制为室内运行。W56频段（5.47–5.725 GHz）在中国须遵守DFS规定方可用于室内和室外。中国SRRC针对5 GHz低频段的信道限制与GCC方法总体一致。
summary.zht: 中國在SRRC無線電型號認證要求下也對W52和W53子頻段（5.15–5.35 GHz）實施室內使用限制。中國SRRC批准的5 GHz Wi-Fi裝置須為W53信道實施DFS（動態頻率選擇）和TPC（發射功率控制），並須將W52限制為室內運行。W56頻段（5.47–5.725 GHz）在中國須遵守DFS規定方可用於室內和室外。中國SRRC針對5 GHz低頻段的信道限制與GCC方法總體一致。

standards_or_laws: SRRC Radio Type Approval — 5 GHz channel plan (MIIT SRRC requirements for 5 GHz WLAN)
GB/T 15629.11 (Chinese Wi-Fi standard — 5 GHz channel allocation)
MIIT Provisions on the Management of 5 GHz Band WLAN Equipment

gap.en: The W52 / W53 indoor-only restriction is broadly similar between Qatar and China. However, the gap is procedural: SRRC 5 GHz channel restriction compliance in China does not satisfy CRA Qatar's separate type approval requirement. Firmware must be programmed and declared specifically to CRA Qatar's channel plan. China-market firmware that permits W52 / W53 outdoor operation or different channel configurations for the China regulatory environment may need to be locked or reconfigured for Qatar. Manufacturers should confirm exact CRA Qatar channel permissions for W56 and W58 (outdoor bands) before enabling those sub-bands in Qatar-market firmware.
gap.zh: 卡塔尔和中国的W52/W53室内限制大体相似。然而，差距在于程序：中国的SRRC 5 GHz信道限制合规并不满足卡塔尔CRA单独的型号认证要求。固件须专门针对卡塔尔CRA的信道方案进行编程和声明。允许W52/W53室外运行或针对中国监管环境不同信道配置的中国市场固件可能需要为卡塔尔进行锁定或重新配置。制造商在卡塔尔市场固件中启用W56和W58（室外频段）子频段前，须向CRA卡塔尔确认其确切的信道许可。
gap.zht: 卡達和中國的W52/W53室內限制大體相似。然而，差距在於程序：中國的SRRC 5 GHz信道限制合規並不滿足卡達CRA單獨的型號認證要求。固件須專門針對卡達CRA的信道方案進行編程和聲明。允許W52/W53室外運行或針對中國監管環境不同信道配置的中國市場固件可能需要為卡達進行鎖定或重新配置。製造商在卡達市場固件中啟用W56和W58（室外頻段）子頻段前，須向卡達CRA確認其確切的信道許可。

source.publisher: CRA — Communications Regulatory Authority Qatar (هيئة الاتصالات)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Qatar restricts 5 GHz W52 (5.15–5.25 GHz) and W53 (5.25–5.35 GHz) to indoor use; outdoor use is prohibited. CRA Qatar type approval requires firmware declaration and enforcement of Qatar channel restrictions. China SRRC 5 GHz channel approval does not satisfy CRA Qatar requirements. W56 / W58 outdoor sub-band availability must be confirmed with CRA Qatar before enabling in product firmware.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 卡塔尔将5 GHz W52（5.15–5.25 GHz）和W53（5.25–5.35 GHz）限制为室内使用；禁止室外使用。卡塔尔CRA型号认证要求固件声明并执行卡塔尔信道限制。中国SRRC 5 GHz信道批准不满足卡塔尔CRA要求。W56/W58室外子频段的可用性须在产品固件中启用前向卡塔尔CRA确认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 卡達將5 GHz W52（5.15–5.25 GHz）和W53（5.25–5.35 GHz）限制為室內使用；禁止室外使用。卡達CRA型號認證要求固件聲明並執行卡達信道限制。中國SRRC 5 GHz信道批准不滿足卡達CRA要求。W56/W58室外子頻段的可用性須在產品固件中啟用前向卡達CRA確認。
